name: Single Combat
description: Activate only when you control a Beast monster. Target 1 face-up monster: until end of turn, only that monster and your Beast can attack or be attacked.

effect.description: Until end of turn, only the targeted monster and your Beast can attack or be attacked.

name: Verdant Renewal
description: Send 1 face-up Plant monster you control to the Graveyard, then draw 2 cards.

name: Tide Surge
description: All Aquatic monsters you control gain +400 ATK and +200 DEF.

effect.description: All your Aquatic monsters: +400 ATK / +200 DEF.

name: Sky Mavis Field
description: Once per turn, when an Axie monster is summoned, that monster gains +300 ATK until end of turn.

effect.description: On Axie summon, that monster gains +300 ATK until end of turn.

name: Lunacian Blessing
description: Equip to 1 face-up monster you control. The equipped monster gains +500 ATK and cannot be destroyed by trap effects.
